description_long: This is a rectangular woven picnic basket with a sturdy, double-hinged handle made of light-colored, possibly rattan or wicker material. The basket's body features a tightly interlaced weave with alternating bands of natural beige, purple, and orange hues, creating a visually appealing striped pattern. The rim is reinforced with a thicker, rounded band, providing structural integrity and a finished look. The interior is open and spacious, suitable for carrying food, utensils, or other picnic essentials. The handles are attached at the shorter sides and can fold down or stand upright for easy carrying. There is no visible lid or closure mechanism, leaving the contents accessible from the top.
description: A rectangular, woven picnic basket with double folding handles and a striped beige, purple, and orange pattern. The basket is open-topped and reinforced at the rim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the basket's wide side, both handles upright, and the striped weave pattern clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow end of the basket, the handles aligned, and the depth of the interior.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the same handle and weave details visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the basket's depth and handle alignment.
attribute_handle_type: Double folding handles, rounded, made of woven wicker, attached at the short sides with visible hinges.
attribute_weave_pattern: Tight plain weave with horizontal bands of color, creating a striped decorative effect.
